name: RESIDEO TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
business: Resideo is a global manufacturer, developer, and distributor of technology-driven sensing and controls products and solutions for comfort, security, energy use, and smart living. It sells primarily through a network of approximately 100,000 professional contractors, installers, dealers, and integrators.

exposures.sentence: We are a global manufacturer, developer, and distributor of technology-driven sensing and controls products and solutions that help homeowners and businesses stay connected and in control of their comfort, security, energy use, and smart living.
For example, our video solutions use AI to identify people, animals, packages, and other objects.

Our products and solutions for comfort, energy management, safety, and security benefit from trusted, well-established branded offerings such as Braukmann, BRK, First Alert, Honeywell Home, Resideo, and others.
In addition, our connected products potentially expose our business and customers to cybersecurity threats.
the slowing of the housing market may result in reduced demand for the products we manufacture and distribute.
our business is affected by the performance of the global new construction and the repair and remodel construction industry.

Our offerings include temperature and humidity control, water and air solutions, smoke and carbon monoxide detection home safety products, residential and small business security products, video cameras, other home-related lifestyle convenience solutions, cloud infrastructure, installation and maintenance tools, and related software.

catalysts.event: Announced intention to spin-off ADI Global Distribution segment
catalysts.sentence: On July 30, 2025, we announced our intention to separate the ADI Global Distribution segment through a tax-free spin-off to our shareholders.
